description: HokusaiAMM.sell(uint256,uint256,address,uint256) (contracts/HokusaiAMM.sol#257-302) ignores return value by IERC20(hokusaiToken).transferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),tokensIn) (contracts/HokusaiAMM.sol#283)

BondingCurveMath.ln(uint256) (contracts/libraries/BondingCurveMath.sol#126-164) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- scaled = (scaled * PRECISION) / (3 * PRECISION) (contracts/libraries/BondingCurveMath.sol#135)
	- scaled = (scaled * 3 * PRECISION) / PRECISION (contracts/libraries/BondingCurveMath.sol#141)

DeltaVerifier._recordSingleContribution(string,address,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,string) (contracts/DeltaVerifier.sol#622-660) ignores return value by contributionRegistry.recordContributionBatch(modelId,contributorAddresses,contributionHashes,weightsBps,samples,totalSamples,rewardAmounts,pipelineRunId) (contracts/DeltaVerifier.sol#650-659)

UsageFeeRouter.batchDepositFees(string[],uint256[],uint256[]) (contracts/UsageFeeRouter.sol#185-278) ignores return value by reserveToken.approve(address(infraReserve),totalInfra) (contracts/UsageFeeRouter.sol#265)
